description: Catalog of presentation tones available in the openpresentation.org catalog. Each entry is a lightweight summary; full tone records (voice cues, anti-patterns, sample phrases) live in the per-id JSON files alongside this index. Tones are referenced from OPF documents via tone.

records.name: Formal
records.summary: Polished, restrained voice for board, investor, and regulator audiences.

records.name: Casual
records.summary: Warm, plain-spoken voice for internal updates and customer storytelling.

records.name: Inspirational
records.summary: Aspirational, narrative-driven voice for keynotes, founders, and rallying cries.

records.name: Technical
records.summary: Precise, evidence-led voice for engineering, research, and product-detail audiences.

records.name: Persuasive
records.summary: Argument-led voice for sales, fundraising, and recommendation-driven decks.

records.name: Authoritative
records.summary: Expert, declarative voice for category-defining and analyst-style decks.

records.name: Conversational
records.summary: Direct, dialog-style voice for podcasts, fireside chats, and small-group reviews.
